classdef ExactDiffEQ_Solver < matlab.apps.AppBase % Properties corresponding to app components properties (Access = public) UIFigure matlab.ui.Figure TabGroup matlab.ui.container.TabGroup % Input Panel InputPanel matlab.ui.container.Panel MEditFieldLabel matlab.ui.control.Label MEditField matlab.ui.control.EditField NEditFieldLabel matlab.ui.control.Label NEditField matlab.ui.control.EditField x0EditFieldLabel matlab.ui.control.Label x0EditField matlab.ui.control.NumericEditField y0EditFieldLabel matlab.ui.control.Label y0EditField matlab.ui.control.NumericEditField ExampleDropDownLabel matlab.ui.control.Label ExampleDropDown matlab.ui.control.DropDown SolveButton matlab.ui.control.Button ClearButton matlab.ui.control.Button ExportButton matlab.ui.control.Button % Solution Panel SolutionPanel matlab.ui.container.Panel GeneralSolutionLabel matlab.ui.control.Label GeneralSolutionText matlab.ui.control.TextArea ParticularSolutionLabel matlab.ui.control.Label ParticularSolutionText matlab.ui.control.TextArea ExactnessCheckText matlab.ui.control.TextArea % Visualization Panel VisualizationPanel matlab.ui.container.Panel ContourAxes matlab.ui.control.UIAxes SurfaceAxes matlab.ui.control.UIAxes VectorAxes matlab.ui.control.UIAxes % Step-by-Step Panel StepsPanel matlab.ui.container.Panel StepsTextArea matlab.ui.control.TextArea % Results Panel ResultsPanel matlab.ui.container.Panel ResultsTable matlab.ui.control.Table % Menu FileMenu matlab.ui.container.Menu SaveResultsMenu matlab.ui.container.Menu ExportPlotMenu matlab.ui.container.Menu HelpMenu matlab.ui.container.Menu AboutMenu matlab.ui.container.Menu end properties (Access = private) % Internal properties M_function function_handle N_function function_handle psi_symbolic sym psi_function function_handle solution_found logical = false plot_range = [-3 3 -3 3] end methods (Access = private) function checkExactness(app) % Check if the equation is exact syms x y; try M_sym = str2sym(app.MEditField.Value); N_sym = str2sym(app.NEditField.Value); dM_dy = diff(M_sym, y); dN_dx = diff(N_sym, x); is_exact = isequal(simplify(dM_dy), simplify(dN_dx)); if is_exact app.ExactnessCheckText.Value = sprintf(['✓ Equation is EXACT\n\n' ... '∂M/∂y = %s\n' ... '∂N/∂x = %s\n' ... '∂M/∂y = ∂N/∂x ✓'], ... char(dM_dy), char(dN_dx)); app.ExactnessCheckText.FontColor = [0, 0.5, 0]; else app.ExactnessCheckText.Value = sprintf(['✗ Equation is NOT EXACT\n\n' ... '∂M/∂y = %s\n' ... '∂N/∂x = %s\n' ... 'Difference: %s'], ... char(dM_dy), char(dN_dx), char(dM_dy - dN_dx)); app.ExactnessCheckText.FontColor = [0.8, 0, 0]; end catch ME app.ExactnessCheckText.Value = sprintf('Error: %s', ME.message); app.ExactnessCheckText.FontColor = [0.8, 0, 0]; end end function solveEquation(app) % Solve the exact differential equation syms x y g(y) C; try M_sym = str2sym(app.MEditField.Value); N_sym = str2sym(app.NEditField.Value); % Step 1: Integrate M w.r.t x step1 = sprintf('1. Integrate M w.r.t x:\n ψ₁ = ∫M dx = ∫(%s) dx', char(M_sym)); psi_x = int(M_sym, x) + g(y); step1 = sprintf('%s\n = %s + g(y)', step1, char(psi_x - g(y))); % Step 2: Differentiate w.r.t y step2 = sprintf('\n\n2. Differentiate w.r.t y:\n ∂ψ/∂y = ∂/∂y[%s]', char(psi_x - g(y))); dpsi_dy = diff(psi_x, y); step2 = sprintf('%s\n = %s + g''(y)', step2, char(diff(psi_x - g(y), y))); % Step 3: Equate to N and solve for g'(y) step3 = sprintf('\n\n3. Set ∂ψ/∂y = N and solve for g''(y):\n %s + g''(y) = %s', ... char(diff(psi_x - g(y), y)), char(N_sym)); eqn = dpsi_dy == N_sym; g_prime = solve(eqn, diff(g(y), y)); if isempty(g_prime) % Try integrating N w.r.t y instead psi_y = int(N_sym, y) + g(x); dpsi_dx = diff(psi_y, x); eqn = dpsi_dx == M_sym; g_prime = solve(eqn, diff(g(x), x)); step3 = sprintf('%s\n Alternative method used', step3); end step3 = sprintf('%s\n g''(y) = %s', step3, char(g_prime)); % Step 4: Integrate to find g(y) step4 = sprintf('\n\n4. Integrate to find g(y):\n g(y) = ∫(%s) dy', char(g_prime)); g_y = int(g_prime, y); step4 = sprintf('%s\n = %s', step4, char(g_y)); % Step 5: Construct final solution step5 = sprintf('\n\n5. Construct final solution:'); if contains(char(psi_x), 'g(y)') psi = simplify(psi_x - g(y) + g_y); else psi = simplify(psi_y - g(x) + int(g_prime, x)); end step5 = sprintf('%s\n ψ(x,y) = %s = C', step5, char(psi)); % Update step-by-step display app.StepsTextArea.Value = sprintf('%s%s%s%s%s', ... step1, step2, step3, step4, step5); % Store symbolic solution app.psi_symbolic = psi; % Create function handle app.psi_function = matlabFunction(psi, 'Vars', [x, y]); % Update general solution app.GeneralSolutionText.Value = sprintf('ψ(x,y) = %s = C', char(psi)); % Update particular solution if IC provided x0 = app.x0EditField.Value; y0 = app.y0EditField.Value; if ~isnan(x0) && ~isnan(y0) C_val = subs(psi, [x, y], [x0, y0]); psi_particular = simplify(psi - C_val); app.ParticularSolutionText.Value = sprintf('ψ(x,y) = %s = 0', ... char(psi_particular)); else app.ParticularSolutionText.Value = 'Provide initial condition'; end app.solution_found = true; % Update visualizations updateVisualizations(app); % Update results table updateResultsTable(app); catch ME uialert(app.UIFigure, sprintf('Error: %s', ME.message), 'Solution Error'); end end function updateVisualizations(app) % Update all plots if ~app.solution_found return; end % Create grid x = linspace(app.plot_range(1), app.plot_range(2), 50); y = linspace(app.plot_range(3), app.plot_range(4), 50); [X, Y] = meshgrid(x, y); % Evaluate psi Z = app.psi_function(X, Y); % 1. Contour Plot cla(app.ContourAxes); contour(app.ContourAxes, X, Y, Z, 20, 'LineWidth', 1.5); hold(app.ContourAxes, 'on'); % Mark initial condition x0 = app.x0EditField.Value; y0 = app.y0EditField.Value; if ~isnan(x0) && ~isnan(y0) plot(app.ContourAxes, x0, y0, 'ro', 'MarkerSize', 10, ... 'MarkerFaceColor', 'r', 'DisplayName', 'Initial Condition'); end hold(app.ContourAxes, 'off'); xlabel(app.ContourAxes, 'x'); ylabel(app.ContourAxes, 'y'); title(app.ContourAxes, 'Solution Curves (Contour Plot)'); grid(app.ContourAxes, 'on'); colorbar(app.ContourAxes); % 2. Surface Plot cla(app.SurfaceAxes); surf(app.SurfaceAxes, X, Y, Z, 'EdgeAlpha', 0.3); hold(app.SurfaceAxes, 'on'); if ~isnan(x0) && ~isnan(y0) z0 = app.psi_function(x0, y0); plot3(app.SurfaceAxes, x0, y0, z0, 'ro', 'MarkerSize', 10, ... 'MarkerFaceColor', 'r'); end contour3(app.SurfaceAxes, X, Y, Z, 20, 'k-', 'LineWidth', 0.5); hold(app.SurfaceAxes, 'off'); xlabel(app.SurfaceAxes, 'x'); ylabel(app.SurfaceAxes, 'y'); zlabel(app.SurfaceAxes, 'ψ(x,y)'); title(app.SurfaceAxes, 'Solution Surface'); grid(app.SurfaceAxes, 'on'); colormap(app.SurfaceAxes, 'jet'); % 3. Vector Field Plot cla(app.VectorAxes); % Compute M and N syms x_sym y_sym; M_sym = str2sym(app.MEditField.Value); N_sym = str2sym(app.NEditField.Value); M_func = matlabFunction(M_sym, 'Vars', [x_sym, y_sym]); N_func = matlabFunction(N_sym, 'Vars', [x_sym, y_sym]); % Create vector field [Xv, Yv] = meshgrid(linspace(app.plot_range(1), app.plot_range(2), 15), ... linspace(app.plot_range(3), app.plot_range(4), 15)); U = zeros(size(Xv)); V = zeros(size(Yv)); for i = 1:numel(Xv) U(i) = M_func(Xv(i), Yv(i)); V(i) = N_func(Xv(i), Yv(i)); end % Normalize for better visualization norm_factor = sqrt(U.^2 + V.^2); U_norm = U ./ (norm_factor + eps); V_norm = V ./ (norm_factor + eps); quiver(app.VectorAxes, Xv, Yv, U_norm, V_norm, 0.5, 'b'); xlabel(app.VectorAxes, 'x'); ylabel(app.VectorAxes, 'y'); title(app.VectorAxes, 'Vector Field (M, N)'); grid(app.VectorAxes, 'on'); axis(app.VectorAxes, 'equal'); end function updateResultsTable(app) % Update results table with computed values if ~app.solution_found return; end syms x y; % Compute various quantities M_sym = str2sym(app.MEditField.Value); N_sym = str2sym(app.NEditField.Value); psi_sym = app.psi_symbolic; dM_dy = diff(M_sym, y); dN_dx = diff(N_sym, x); dpsi_dx = diff(psi_sym, x); dpsi_dy = diff(psi_sym, y); % Create table data data = { 'M(x,y)', char(M_sym); 'N(x,y)', char(N_sym); '∂M/∂y', char(dM_dy); '∂N/∂x', char(dN_dx); 'Exact?', char(simplify(dM_dy - dN_dx) == 0); 'ψ(x,y)', char(psi_sym); '∂ψ/∂x', char(dpsi_dx); '∂ψ/∂y', char(dpsi_dy); 'Verification M', char(simplify(dpsi_dx - M_sym) == 0); 'Verification N', char(simplify(dpsi_dy - N_sym) == 0) }; app.ResultsTable.Data = data; end function loadExample(app, example_idx) % Load example differential equation switch example_idx case 1 % Example 1: Basic exact equation app.MEditField.Value = '2*x*y'; app.NEditField.Value = 'x^2 + cos(y)'; app.x0EditField.Value = 0; app.y0EditField.Value = 1; case 2 % Example 2: With trigonometric functions app.MEditField.Value = 'y*cos(x) + 2*x*exp(y)'; app.NEditField.Value = 'sin(x) + x^2*exp(y) - 1'; app.x0EditField.Value = 0; app.y0EditField.Value = 0; case 3 % Example 3: Polynomial equation app.MEditField.Value = '3*x^2 + 2*x*y'; app.NEditField.Value = 'x^2 + 3*y^2'; app.x0EditField.Value = 1; app.y0EditField.Value = 0; case 4 % Example 4: Non-exact equation app.MEditField.Value = 'x^2 + y'; app.NEditField.Value = 'x - y^2'; app.x0EditField.Value = 0; app.y0EditField.Value = 0; case 5 % Example 5: Advanced example app.MEditField.Value = '(1 + ln(x*y))'; app.NEditField.Value = '1 + ln(x*y)'; app.x0EditField.Value = 1; app.y0EditField.Value = 1; end % Automatically check exactness and solve checkExactness(app); solveEquation(app); end end % Callback methods methods (Access = private) % Button pushed function: SolveButton function SolveButtonPushed(app, event) checkExactness(app); solveEquation(app); end % Button pushed function: ClearButton function ClearButtonPushed(app, event) % Clear all fields app.MEditField.Value = ''; app.NEditField.Value = ''; app.x0EditField.Value = NaN; app.y0EditField.Value = NaN; app.GeneralSolutionText.Value = ''; app.ParticularSolutionText.Value = ''; app.ExactnessCheckText.Value = ''; app.StepsTextArea.Value = ''; app.ResultsTable.Data = {}; % Clear plots cla(app.ContourAxes); cla(app.SurfaceAxes); cla(app.VectorAxes); app.solution_found = false; end % Menu selected function: ExampleDropDown function ExampleDropDownValueChanged(app, event) value = app.ExampleDropDown.Value; switch value case 'Example 1' loadExample(app, 1); case 'Example 2' loadExample(app, 2); case 'Example 3' loadExample(app, 3); case 'Example 4' loadExample(app, 4); case 'Example 5' loadExample(app, 5); end end % Button pushed function: ExportButton function ExportButtonPushed(app, event) % Export results to various formats if ~app.solution_found uialert(app.UIFigure, 'No solution to export', 'Export Error'); return; end % Create export options dialog [file, path] = uiputfile({... '*.pdf', 'PDF Document (*.pdf)'; ... '*.png', 'PNG Image (*.png)'; ... '*.fig', 'MATLAB Figure (*.fig)'; ... '*.mat', 'MATLAB Data (*.mat)'; ... '*.txt', 'Text File (*.txt)'}, ... 'Export Results'); if isequal(file, 0) return; % User cancelled end [~, ~, ext] = fileparts(file); try switch lower(ext) case '.pdf' exportToPDF(app, fullfile(path, file)); case '.png' exportToPNG(app, fullfile(path, file)); case '.fig' exportToFIG(app, fullfile(path, file)); case '.mat' exportToMAT(app, fullfile(path, file)); case '.txt' exportToTXT(app, fullfile(path, file)); end msgbox(sprintf('Successfully exported to:\n%s', fullfile(path, file)), ... 'Export Complete', 'help'); catch ME uialert(app.UIFigure, sprintf('Export failed: %s', ME.message), ... 'Export Error'); end end function exportToPDF(app, filename) % Export to PDF fig = figure('Visible', 'off'); % Create report layout subplot(3,2,1); copyobj(app.ContourAxes.Children, gca); title('Solution Contours'); subplot(3,2,2); copyobj(app.SurfaceAxes.Children, gca); title('Solution Surface'); subplot(3,2,3); text(0.1, 0.9, sprintf('Equation: (%s)dx + (%s)dy = 0', ... app.MEditField.Value, app.NEditField.Value), ... 'FontSize', 10); text(0.1, 0.7, sprintf('General Solution: %s', ... app.GeneralSolutionText.Value), 'FontSize', 10); text(0.1, 0.5, sprintf('Particular Solution: %s', ... app.ParticularSolutionText.Value), 'FontSize', 10); axis off; subplot(3,2,4); copyobj(app.VectorAxes.Children, gca); title('Vector Field'); subplot(3,2,[5,6]); steps_text = app.StepsTextArea.Value; text(0.1, 0.9, 'Step-by-Step Solution:', 'FontSize', 11, 'FontWeight', 'bold'); text(0.1, 0.8, steps_text, 'FontSize', 8, 'VerticalAlignment', 'top'); axis off; print(fig, filename, '-dpdf'); close(fig); end function exportToPNG(app, filename) % Export summary image fig = figure('Visible', 'off', 'Position', [100, 100, 800, 600]); subplot(2,2,1); copyobj(app.ContourAxes.Children, gca); title('Solution'); axis equal; subplot(2,2,2); text(0.1, 0.9, sprintf('M = %s', app.MEditField.Value), 'FontSize', 10); text(0.1, 0.8, sprintf('N = %s', app.NEditField.Value), 'FontSize', 10); text(0.1, 0.7, app.GeneralSolutionText.Value, 'FontSize', 10); text(0.1, 0.6, app.ParticularSolutionText.Value, 'FontSize', 10); axis off; subplot(2,2,3); copyobj(app.SurfaceAxes.Children, gca); title('Surface'); view(45, 30); subplot(2,2,4); copyobj(app.VectorAxes.Children, gca); title('Vector Field'); axis equal; saveas(fig, filename); close(fig); end function exportToTXT(app, filename) % Export solution details to text file fid = fopen(filename, 'w'); fprintf(fid, 'Exact Differential Equation Solver Report\n'); fprintf(fid, '==========================================\n\n'); fprintf(fid, 'Input Equation:\n'); fprintf(fid, 'M(x,y) = %s\n', app.MEditField.Value); fprintf(fid, 'N(x,y) = %s\n\n', app.NEditField.Value); fprintf(fid, 'Initial Condition:\n'); fprintf(fid, 'x₀ = %g, y₀ = %g\n\n', ... app.x0EditField.Value, app.y0EditField.Value); fprintf(fid, 'Solution:\n'); fprintf(fid, '%s\n', app.GeneralSolutionText.Value); fprintf(fid, '%s\n\n', app.ParticularSolutionText.Value); fprintf(fid, 'Exactness Check:\n%s\n\n', app.ExactnessCheckText.Value); fprintf(fid, 'Step-by-Step Solution:\n'); fprintf(fid, '%s\n', app.StepsTextArea.Value); fclose(fid); end % Menu selected function: AboutMenu function AboutMenuSelected(app, event) % Show about dialog about_text = sprintf(['ExactDiffEQ Solver v1.0\n\n' ... 'Developed for MATLAB App Development Project\n' ... 'Topic: Exact Differential Equations\n\n' ... 'Features:\n' ... '• Solve exact differential equations\n' ... '• Step-by-step solution display\n' ... '• Multiple visualization options\n' ... '• Export functionality\n\n' ... 'Created using MATLAB App Designer']); uialert(app.UIFigure, about_text, 'About', 'Icon', 'info'); end end % App initialization and construction methods (Access = private) % Create UIFigure and components function createComponents(app) % Create UIFigure app.UIFigure = uifigure('Visible', 'off'); app.UIFigure.Position = [100 100 1400 800]; app.UIFigure.Name = 'ExactDiffEQ Solver'; app.UIFigure.Color = [0.96 0.96 0.96]; % Create TabGroup app.TabGroup = uitabgroup(app.UIFigure); app.TabGroup.Position = [20 20 1360 760]; % Create Main Tab mainTab = uitab(app.TabGroup); mainTab.Title = 'Solver'; % Create Input Panel app.InputPanel = uipanel(mainTab); app.InputPanel.Title = 'Input Equation'; app.InputPanel.Position = [20 600 400 130]; app.InputPanel.FontWeight = 'bold'; % M(x,y) input app.MEditFieldLabel = uilabel(app.InputPanel); app.MEditFieldLabel.HorizontalAlignment = 'right'; app.MEditFieldLabel.Position = [20 75 50 22]; app.MEditFieldLabel.Text = 'M(x,y) ='; app.MEditField = uieditfield(app.InputPanel, 'text'); app.MEditField.Position = [85 75 300 22]; app.MEditField.Value = '2*x*y'; % N(x,y) input app.NEditFieldLabel = uilabel(app.InputPanel); app.NEditFieldLabel.HorizontalAlignment = 'right'; app.NEditFieldLabel.Position = [20 45 50 22]; app.NEditFieldLabel.Text = 'N(x,y) ='; app.NEditField = uieditfield(app.InputPanel, 'text'); app.NEditField.Position = [85 45 300 22]; app.NEditField.Value = 'x^2 + cos(y)'; % Initial conditions app.x0EditFieldLabel = uilabel(app.InputPanel); app.x0EditFieldLabel.HorizontalAlignment = 'right'; app.x0EditFieldLabel.Position = [20 15 30 22]; app.x0EditFieldLabel.Text = 'x₀ ='; app.x0EditField = uieditfield(app.InputPanel, 'numeric'); app.x0EditField.Position = [55 15 60 22]; app.x0EditField.Value = 0; app.y0EditFieldLabel = uilabel(app.InputPanel); app.y0EditFieldLabel.HorizontalAlignment = 'right'; app.y0EditFieldLabel.Position = [125 15 30 22]; app.y0EditFieldLabel.Text = 'y₀ ='; app.y0EditField = uieditfield(app.InputPanel, 'numeric'); app.y0EditField.Position = [160 15 60 22]; app.y0EditField.Value = 1; % Example dropdown app.ExampleDropDownLabel = uilabel(app.InputPanel); app.ExampleDropDownLabel.HorizontalAlignment = 'right'; app.ExampleDropDownLabel.Position = [230 15 60 22]; app.ExampleDropDownLabel.Text = 'Examples:'; app.ExampleDropDown = uidropdown(app.InputPanel); app.ExampleDropDown.Position = [295 15 90 22]; app.ExampleDropDown.Items = {'Select...', 'Example 1', 'Example 2', ... 'Example 3', 'Example 4', 'Example 5'}; app.ExampleDropDown.Value = 'Select...'; % Buttons app.SolveButton = uibutton(mainTab, 'push'); app.SolveButton.Position = [440 650 100 30]; app.SolveButton.Text = 'Solve'; app.SolveButton.BackgroundColor = [0.2 0.6 0.2]; app.SolveButton.FontColor = [1 1 1]; app.SolveButton.FontWeight = 'bold'; app.ClearButton = uibutton(mainTab, 'push'); app.ClearButton.Position = [550 650 100 30]; app.ClearButton.Text = 'Clear'; app.ClearButton.BackgroundColor = [0.8 0.2 0.2]; app.ClearButton.FontColor = [1 1 1]; app.ClearButton.FontWeight = 'bold'; app.ExportButton = uibutton(mainTab, 'push'); app.ExportButton.Position = [660 650 100 30]; app.ExportButton.Text = 'Export'; app.ExportButton.BackgroundColor = [0.2 0.2 0.8]; app.ExportButton.FontColor = [1 1 1]; app.ExportButton.FontWeight = 'bold'; % Create Solution Panel app.SolutionPanel = uipanel(mainTab); app.SolutionPanel.Title = 'Solution'; app.SolutionPanel.Position = [440 450 400 180]; app.SolutionPanel.FontWeight = 'bold'; app.GeneralSolutionLabel = uilabel(app.SolutionPanel); app.GeneralSolutionLabel.Position = [10 130 100 22]; app.GeneralSolutionLabel.Text = 'General Solution:'; app.GeneralSolutionText = uitextarea(app.SolutionPanel); app.GeneralSolutionText.Position = [10 90 380 40]; app.GeneralSolutionText.Editable = 'off'; app.GeneralSolutionText.BackgroundColor = [0.98 0.98 0.9]; app.ParticularSolutionLabel = uilabel(app.SolutionPanel); app.ParticularSolutionLabel.Position = [10 50 120 22]; app.ParticularSolutionLabel.Text = 'Particular Solution:'; app.ParticularSolutionText = uitextarea(app.SolutionPanel); app.ParticularSolutionText.Position = [10 10 380 40]; app.ParticularSolutionText.Editable = 'off'; app.ParticularSolutionText.BackgroundColor = [0.98 0.98 0.9]; % Create Exactness Check Panel exactnessPanel = uipanel(mainTab); exactnessPanel.Title = 'Exactness Check'; exactnessPanel.Position = [440 300 400 140]; exactnessPanel.FontWeight = 'bold'; app.ExactnessCheckText = uitextarea(exactnessPanel); app.ExactnessCheckText.Position = [10 10 380 120]; app.ExactnessCheckText.Editable = 'off'; app.ExactnessCheckText.BackgroundColor = [0.95 0.95 1]; % Create Visualization Panel app.VisualizationPanel = uipanel(mainTab); app.VisualizationPanel.Title = 'Visualizations'; app.VisualizationPanel.Position = [20 20 400 560]; app.VisualizationPanel.FontWeight = 'bold'; % Create axes for plots app.ContourAxes = uiaxes(app.VisualizationPanel); app.ContourAxes.Position = [10 320 380 220]; title(app.ContourAxes, 'Solution Curves'); app.SurfaceAxes = uiaxes(app.VisualizationPanel); app.SurfaceAxes.Position = [10 60 380 220]; title(app.SurfaceAxes, 'Solution Surface'); app.VectorAxes = uiaxes(app.VisualizationPanel); app.VectorAxes.Position = [10 320 380 220]; title(app.VectorAxes, 'Vector Field'); % Initially hide vector axes app.VectorAxes.Visible = 'off'; % Create Steps Panel app.StepsPanel = uipanel(mainTab); app.StepsPanel.Title = 'Step-by-Step Solution'; app.StepsPanel.Position = [860 20 520 760]; app.StepsPanel.FontWeight = 'bold'; app.StepsTextArea = uitextarea(app.StepsPanel); app.StepsTextArea.Position = [10 10 500 740]; app.StepsTextArea.Editable = 'off'; app.StepsTextArea.BackgroundColor = [1 1 1]; app.StepsTextArea.FontName = 'Monospaced'; % Create Results Tab resultsTab = uitab(app.TabGroup); resultsTab.Title = 'Results'; app.ResultsPanel = uipanel(resultsTab); app.ResultsPanel.Title = 'Computed Results'; app.ResultsPanel.Position = [20 20 1320 720]; app.ResultsPanel.FontWeight = 'bold'; % Create results table app.ResultsTable = uitable(app.ResultsPanel); app.ResultsTable.Position = [20 20 1280 680]; app.ResultsTable.ColumnName = {'Quantity', 'Value'}; app.ResultsTable.ColumnWidth = {150, 600}; app.ResultsTable.RowName = {}; % Create Visualization Tab visTab = uitab(app.TabGroup); visTab.Title = 'Visualization';
